proposal.title: Dead code detection silently disabled for modified files
proposal.whyThisBoundary: reviewDiff is the core pipeline orchestrator. Its dead code detection path filters candidate files by status. The blue team's dead code test only exercises 'added' files (DIFF_ADD_NEWUTIL), leaving the 'modified' filter arm completely unverified. Removing the modified filter silently disables dead code detection for the most common diff case (modified files), a significant behavioral regression.
proposal.survivalRationale: The only dead code assertion (line 480) uses DIFF_ADD_NEWUTIL which produces status='added'. Tests using DIFF_MODIFY_ADD (status='modified') check Array.isArray(review.deadCode) but never assert on its contents. The multiply function (exported, unused) would vanish from deadCode results for modified files — no test catches this.
proposal.validatorNotes: This is a single-line filter change in reviewDiff. No other function is affected. The mutation preserves dead code detection for added and renamed files but silently disables it for modified files.
